MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tita Guzman is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jadira D. Altamirano is present.
Attorney Stephen H. Cassidy representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westly, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
